scope: Cycle 30: Bug hunt C29 (talent wiring in store_run.gd + ArbreDeVie.tscn)
overall_assessment: Bug hunt C29: 0 bugs found. StoreTalents.apply_talent_effects_for_run() returns early for empty talent tree but get_talent_modifier() and consume_talent_modifier() both use defensive .get() chaining that gracefully returns false/null for missing keys. passive_heal life_max fallback to LIFE_ESSENCE_MAX is correct behavior. harmony_anam_bonus faction iteration is safe because StoreFactions initializes all 5 factions. ArbreDeVie.tscn script paths verified (arbre_de_vie_ui.gd + arbre_pixel_art.gd both exist). 36 total bugs fixed across 30 cycles.
